uplink.description: Telemetry: air temperature 22.5 C, relative humidity 48.6%
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: 4097 -> 22500/1000 = 22.5 C, 4098 -> 48600/1000 = 48.6 %. Two 7-byte frames + CRC16 trailer (220,129) computed to zero the running CRC. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (messages: 4097=>22.5, 4098=>48.6) and normalizing measurement IDs to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: Telemetry with negative temperature plus battery: -5.25 C, 87.3% RH, battery 95%
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: 4097 -> two's-complement -5250/1000 = -5.25 C, 4098 -> 87300/1000 = 87.3 %, special dataID 7 battery low-16-bits = 95% (interval high-16 = 60 min, dropped). Three 7-byte frames + CRC16 trailer (156,37). expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (upstream reports the negative temperature as the string "-5.25"; our codec emits the number -5.25). batteryPercent is a camelCase extra because the vocabulary `battery` is volts, not percent.

uplink.description: Corrupted payload: CRC16 trailer does not validate
uplink._note: Vector A with the final CRC byte flipped (129 -> 126); the running CRC16 no longer reaches zero. reference/upstream-codec.js reports valid:false, err:-1 ("crc check fail").
